text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On my day off, I notice Narita Taishin<n>near the
station. She must've just<n>finished something,
because she's<n>heading back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hang on, isn't there supposed to bea limited-edition Animal Huntcharacter that spawns around here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I might as well catch it while I have<n>the chance.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't see it on the radar—
Bwah?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What the—?! "Wet concrete. Please<n>watch your
step"?!

text_block_list.name: Construction Worker
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, miss. I think your boot's done<n>for. Such a
shame.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Oops.

(Great, now I only have one boot.<n>How am I
supposed to get home<n>barefoot?)
choice_data_list: Taishin? Is that you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh.

Oh, do you know this little lady? She<n>stuck her foot
straight into the wet<n>concrete.

text_block_list.name: Construction Worker
text_block_list.text:
Good thing your friend's here now,<n>miss! Take
care getting home!

Narita Taishin is bright red with<n>embarrassment as
the construction<n>worker waves goodbye and
leaves.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I need help or anything.<n>Leave me
alone.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, it's clear that<n>she'll have
trouble getting back to her<n>dorm on her own.
choice_data_list: Hang on, I'll buy you some shoes.
Hang on, I'll buy you some shoes.

Let me get you to a shoe shop. You can lean on
my shoulder.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, it's clear that<n>she'll have
trouble getting back to her<n>dorm on her own.
choice_data_list: Hang on, I'll buy you some shoes.
Hang on, I'll buy you some shoes.

Let me get you to a shoe shop. You can lean on
my shoulder.

text_block_list.text:
You got wax in your ears? I said I<n>don't need your
help.
choice_data_list: Should I give your dorm a call instead, then?
Should I give your dorm a call instead, then?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: N-no! That'll just make things worse!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Fine. Here, take this moneyand get me new shoes.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Since I got her permission, I bring her<n>to a nearby
park to wait for me, then<n>rush to a shoe shop.

text_block_list.name: Shoe Store Employee
text_block_list.text:
Young people these days love this<n>style! They're
also great to run in, so<n>I highly recommend them!

text_block_list.name: Shoe Store Employee
text_block_list.text:
And since you mentioned it earlier,<n>these shoes go
great with street<n>fashion too!
choice_data_list: I see...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I figure I can't go wrong with shoes<n>that have the
employee's seal of<n>approval, so I buy the pair she
recommends.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that, I run back to Narita Taishin<n>and show
her the new shoes.
Oh, thanks. You're a lifesav—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What the hell's with this cutesy<n>nonsense?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
These aren't my style at all! You<n>should know
better!
choice_data_list: But the clerk said they go well with street fashion.
But the clerk said they go well with street fashion.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Now you're just admitting you got<n>conned by a
sales pitch. Ugh,<n>whatever. I guess I'll put them
on.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Huh... These actually don't feel so<n>bad once you
put them on.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Urgh.
choice_data_list: They look great on you, Taishin!
They look great on you, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I-I don't need your flattery. As long<n>as they don't
look weird, they're<n>fine.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin seems indifferent about<n>her new
shoes, but...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Taishin? Heading out<n>somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you really like those new<n>shoes of
yours! ♪ They look amazing<n>with your outfit today!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Y-you think?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah... I guess they do.

Absolutely not! I'd rather hop there<n>on my own
than lean on you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hup... Gah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin attempts to hop her<n>way over but
loses balance after a<n>few bounds.
choice_data_list:
You're going to hurt yourself! Come on, hold onto
me!

You're going to hurt yourself! Come on, hold onto
me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh, fine.
She reluctantly grabs hold of my<n>shoulder.

After walking for a while together, we<n>come
across a park and decide to<n>rest on a bench.
choice_data_list: So, what were you doing around there?
So, what were you doing around there?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...Playing a game. One of those<n>location-based
ones.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The game involves finding and<n>capturing
characters that are<n>projected into the real world
via<n>augmented reality.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She had been trying to catch a<n>limited-edition
character when I saw<n>her in front of the station.
choice_data_list:
Maybe we'll find the character while we're
walking.

Maybe we'll find the character while we're
walking.

text_block_list.text: As if it'd be that—
No way! There's a blip on the radar!

Apparently, the character she's after<n>has actually
appeared. She tells me<n>its coordinates, which
aren't too far<n>from where we are now.
choice_data_list: It's close by. Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list:
You gotta let off some steam after that whole shoe
fiasco!

You gotta let off some steam after that whole shoe
fiasco!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's not a bad way to look at it. It'd<n>suck to go
back with a bad taste in<n>my mouth because of
that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All right. I'm definitely gonna catch it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin nods, and I lend her my<n>shoulder
again. We head off to where<n>the character has
appeared.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Our teamwork pays off, and Narita<n>Taishin
manages to capture the<n>limited-edition character.
choice_data_list: Congrats, Taishin!

text_block_list.text: Yeah, thanks. I guess I do feel a little<n>better.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Having finally arrived at a shop, Narita<n>Taishin
buys new shoes. She seems<n>to be in a better
mood when we part.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I've grown a little closer to<n>Narita Taishin
after working together<n>with her.
